evidence_digest.failed_part: <compact key fields from runs/<task_id>/failed-part.json: part_id, transfer_method, asset, amount, account_src, account_dest, address_src, address_dest, recon_id_src, recon_id_dest, internal_id, txn_id, status, recon_src, recon_dest, start_time, transfer_time, and the failed-phase error log field>
evidence_digest.error_code: <resolved error-code summary from error-code-resolver (classification + native_code + meaning), or null>
evidence_digest.account_anomalies: <short notes from collect_account_evidence output, or null>
evidence_digest.instrument_anomalies: <short notes from collect_instrument_evidence output, or null>

loki_time_window.start_rfc3339: <orchestrator-computed UTC RFC3339 (…Z), phase-anchored per phases/3-investigation-loop.md: transfer-phase → (transfer_time|start_time) minus pad; recon-phase → transfer_time minus pad; in-flight → start_time minus pad>
loki_time_window.end_rfc3339: <orchestrator-computed UTC RFC3339 (…Z), phase-anchored: transfer-phase → transfer_time plus pad; recon-phase → start_time plus pad (NOT now); in-flight → now>
